channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 18th April
item.description:
Articles dumped off Frogfurlong Lane on side of access track.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frog Furlong Lane, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wobbly paving slabs outside 10 SRN, 18th April
item.description:
At least two paving slabs outside of the gate for 10 Sydenham Road North are wobbly and need relaying. They are in good condition, but need cementing in place.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Sydenham Road North, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pair of holes, axle width apart, 18th April
item.description:
Close to another hole reported, a paid of holes. They're axle width apart so difficult to avoid without mounting the verge which is becoming damaged. Close to What3Words homeward.backup.crumble

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole in road, 18th April
item.description:
Large hole outside the house at Little Colesbourne, the road between Colesbourne A435 and Withington Village. What3Words homeward.backup.crumble

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes all along the road, 18th April
item.description:
Road outside of Leckhampton High School
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farm Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lane sign vandalised and missing, 18th April
item.description:
Arden road Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Arden Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Between A417 and The Business Park entrance, 18th April
item.description:
Mattress

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge Court, Churchdown, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: The whole road is full of potholes and needs resurfacing, 18th April
item.description:
The whole street is full of potholes, some are very deep and wide. Please consider resurfacing the whole street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Great Western Terrace, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gulley blocked for months, 18th April
item.description:
Gulley in centre of alley between Albert Street and Hungerford Street (opposite back gate of 36 Albert Street). Gloucester County Council has confirmed that this road is maintained at public expense - Enquiry 22102308, Highway Records , Asset Data
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Hungerford Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain on old Bath road, 18th April
item.description:
Blocked drain on old Bath Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22b, Old Bath Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long pothole on old Bath Road, 18th April
item.description:
Long pothole on old Bath Road. Centre of road along lines, opposite Argyll Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Old Bath Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking Sign misaligned causing drivers to incur parking tickets, 18th April
item.description:
On Tobyfield Road, Bishop's Cleeve, GL52 8PL by the parking bays to the front of the old Factory Shop Building

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tobyfield Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Drain completely blocked outside Sunnyside, 18th April
item.description:
Drain completely blocked outside Sunnyside
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Gloucester Road, Andoversford, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep circular pothole in middle of road, 17th April
item.description:
Deep pothole central on road at the beginning of Coniston Road (Windermere Road end) outside of numbers 1 and 2 Coniston Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Coniston Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Number of potholes across road, 17th April
item.description:
Large number of potholes across carriage way causing cars to swerve or slow to a crawl. Very dangerous and needs urgent fixing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greyhound Gardens, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge amount of potholes, 17th April
item.description:
A vast number of pot holes, large and deep in size across the whole carageway. Cars requiring to swerve around them causing danger to other drivers and pedestrians including school children as close to a school. Urgent issue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Church Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A barrier has been placed across the road blocking traffic in both directions. The road has been indicated as closed all week. It is unclear why the road needs to be shut or if this is official as there is only a small hole in the pavement. There has been little activity near the hole and the road has been left closed with an obstructing fence placed across the road., 17th April
item.description:
At the bottom of Harp Hill where it joins Priors Road and Hales Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Harp Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: 2 x potholes, 17th April
item.description:
On LH side when you drive in, next to pavement before No 40 house on left
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement seriously damaged by roots Pedestrians continually tripping here, 17th April
item.description:
Pavement is between the road and the front garden of 25 Thirlmere Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thirlmere Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 17th April
item.description:
They have closed the road despite finishing the works. It is just an inconvenience to the public and local businesses when you also factor in this evenings rush hour and Monday mornings rush hour. They have given access for pedestrians only. Why is this. Can this be pushed to be open?
Report on FixMyStreet
